headline: Office life: tales from the Christmas party dance floor
summary: What’s the point of the office Christmas party?
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Working It podcast episode: ‘Office life — tales from the Christmas party dance floor’

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Jo Hemmings It’s like a sort of booby trap, really, because if you’re not, you know, dancing, which is a lot of people’s downfalls, you’ve got the booze, you might have a wardrobe malfunction, you might do something a bit silly. You’ve got to expect things like small talk with colleagues that you perhaps wouldn’t really have any conversations with at all. Or if you do that very work-oriented, how much self-disclosure are you gonna give, how far you can get out of your comfort zone and behave in a way that you wouldn’t at work, but where that boundary pretty much stops where you might regret something.

Isabel Berwick Hello and welcome to Working It with me, Isabel Berwick.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

It’s the festive season and today we’re talking about the workplace Christmas party. Some people dread them and some can’t get enough of the drink and the danci
